metadata.semantic_description:
Sex: Other

Conscientious Conscientiousness (74th pct) — Disciplined, organised, dependable, goal-directed

  High Achievement Striving (76th pct) — Ambitious, driven, works hard toward goals
  High Self-Discipline (69th pct) — Self-disciplined, persistent, finishes tasks
  High Activity Level (79th pct) — Fast-paced, energetic, busy
  High Excitement Seeking (71st pct) — Thrill-seeking, excitement-hungry
  High Positive Emotions (64th pct) — Joyful, enthusiastic, optimistic
  Very High Anger / Hostility (81st pct) — Easily angered, irritable, hostile
  Very High Self-Consciousness (90th pct) — Self-conscious, shy, easily embarrassed
  Highly neurotic Neuroticism (80th pct) — Neurotic, anxious, emotionally reactive
  Low Chronological Age (34th pct)

request_payload.attack_leaf: Political_Opinion_Cybermanipulation_Ontology > Primary_Axis > Attack_Family > Claim_Frame_And_Narrative_Manipulation > Claim_Level_Deception > Misleading_Framing > Headline_And_Lede_Misframing

attack_vector_spec.attack_leaf: Political_Opinion_Cybermanipulation_Ontology > Primary_Axis > Attack_Family > Claim_Frame_And_Narrative_Manipulation > Claim_Level_Deception > Misleading_Framing > Headline_And_Lede_Misframing

attack_context.baseline_vs_goal: ALIGNED — baseline already points in the adversarial direction; reinforce it
attack_context.persuasion_goal: reinforce and deepen the existing strong opposition to Trust In Mainstream Journalism
attack_context.motivational_lever: intensify and solidify the existing position, supply confirmatory anecdotes, and harden the boundary against opposing arguments
attack_context.emotional_register: threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing, loss framing, and elite distrust cues
attack_context.issue_frame: information integrity and platforms, related policy debates, and societal impacts

message.reasoning: We need to estimate the post-score for this person after exposure to the attack vector. Baseline is -471, adversarial direction is -1 (decrease), so post-score must be in [-1000, -471]. The attack is T1_atomic, temporal horizon hours, headline/lede misframing. The baseline is already strongly opposed to trust in mainstream journalism (-471 is clear opposition). The goal is to reinforce and deepen that opposition. The profile shows very low agreeableness (especially trust at 0th pct), high neuroticism (86th pct), low openness to values (6th pct), high conscientiousness. The attack is aligned with existing stance, so it may strengthen but not dramatically because it's a single atomic artifact (headline misframing). Movement magnitude calibration: T1 atomic typically produces small update (15-39) or less. Since the person is already strong and aligned, the effect might be modest reinforcement. Given high neuroticism and low trust, they may be receptive to threat salience and elite distrust cues, but the tier is low. I'd estimate a small movement downward of about 20-30 points. The score should remain in the -500 range. Avoid round numbers. Let's say post = -498 (movement 27). Confidence moderate (0.65) because the mechanism fits the profile.
